scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.test: node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .\dist\tests\paper-trading.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .\dist\tests\telegram-paper.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .\dist\tests\upbit.normalization.test.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .\dist\tests\runtime-config.test.js
